title: Fabrication & Site Installation of A380 FIRE TRAINING SIMULATOR
content:
Project Name: Fabrication & Site Installation of A380 FIRE TRAINING SIMULATOR.
Client: Kidde Fire Trainers.
Project code: 4018041.
Description: Scope - Supply, Fabrication, Inspection, Surface preparation, Painting and installation of simulator at Dubai Airport.
The A380 FIRE TRAINING SIMULATOR is the main structure for the Aircraft Crash / Fire / Rescue Trainer. The purpose of the Aircraft Crash / Fire / Rescue Trainer is to provide safe and reliable training for firefighters and other first responders in the approach, control, and extinguishment of typical fires that occur inside and outside aircraft and in search and rescue operations aboard aircraft.
Location: Dubai Airport.
Field of activity: Manufacturing Works and installation at site.
Status: Completed 2019.
MO 304, Jebel Ali free Zone, Dubai, UAE
